attacking_style: Explosive on steep gradients (18-19%), particularly final kilometer. Prefers tactical patience, sitting back during attacks to counter later rather than initiating early moves.
team_tactics: Bahrain positions him aggressively near favorites in classics; often given freedom to infiltrate breaks (17km out typical). Limited evidence of dedicated domestique support for his moves.
terrain_preference: Excels on brutally steep punchy climbs (Mur de Huy hairpins, 18%+ gradients). Strong on short, explosive finishes but struggles to sustain power in high mountains over consecutive days.
vulnerability: Multi-day climbing form deteriorates noticeably; dropped early on consecutive mountain stages. Lacks tactical ruthlessness in breakaways, giving free rides that cost him victories. ITT defense weaker than self-assessed.
key_patterns: Feigns weakness on climbs then surges explosively; tactical deception used multiple times (Tour de Pologne, breaks)
Superior on steepest gradients (18-19%) but can't sustain against pure climbers over 400m+ efforts
Lacks killer instinct in breakaways: allowed Impey free ride, lost sprint despite stronger credentials
Opportunistic GC raider: took yellow/red jerseys via breaks but lost both through overextension within days
Strong bridging ability from peloton to lead groups, showing climbing beyond pure domestique capabilities
Calculates GC time buffers too optimistically (lost Dauphiné yellow by exactly 4 seconds after ITT)
form_trajectory: positive: 2022 showed career-best results including Fleche Wallonne victory and Romandie win from chase, tracking Pogačar at Tour suggests sustained improvement
